verses.text: Manasseh's portion; Zelophehad's daughters claim theirs. Manasseh. The daughters inherit.
Manasseh's portion; Zelophehad's daughters claim theirs. Manasseh. The daughters inherit.
Manasseh's portion; Zelophehad's daughters claim theirs. Manasseh. The daughters inherit.
They receive their inheritance among the brethren. Granted. God's word is kept.
They receive their inheritance among the brethren. Granted. God's word is kept.
They receive their inheritance among the brethren. Granted. God's word is kept.
Manasseh's border and cities are described. Border. Their land is set.
Manasseh's border and cities are described. Border. Their land is set.
Manasseh's border and cities are described. Border. Their land is set.
Manasseh's border and cities are described. Border. Their land is set.
Manasseh's border and cities are described. Border. Their land is set.
They could not drive out the Canaanites at first. Not driven. The work was incomplete.
They could not drive out the Canaanites at first. Not driven. The work was incomplete.
Joseph's sons complain their lot is too small. Complaint. They want more.
Joseph's sons complain their lot is too small. Complaint. They want more.
Joshua bids them clear the wood and drive out the strong. Clear it. Faith must work for the land.
Joshua bids them clear the wood and drive out the strong. Clear it. Faith must work for the land.
